idea-plugin.name: Remote Deploy
idea-plugin.description:
Upload a local file or directory to a remote server over SSH and optionally run a follow-up deploy command without leaving your IDE.

  • Upload files or folders with SFTP
  • Run an optional remote command after upload
  • Reuse saved SSH targets and deploy run configurations
  • Store passwords and passphrases in IntelliJ Password Safe

Best suited for fast server-side iteration, internal tools, and lightweight deploy workflows where a full CI/CD pipeline would be overkill.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
• Initial open source release
  • Deploy from the Tools menu or reusable Run Configurations
  • Support password and private-key SSH authentication
  • Include one-click plugin and source packaging scripts

action.description: Upload files to a remote server and run a deployment command
